PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  wd:Q11151 wdt:P361 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P585 ?seasonDate .
  ?match wdt:P1322 ?season .
  ?match wdt:P1709 "5" ; wdt:P585 ?date .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?seasonDate)
LIMIT 1
